caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses stands at a podium, speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a light blue patterned shirt with colorful decorative bands across the chest and a beaded necklace. In front of him, he holds a piece of yellow paper, which he references as he speaks. The background consists of horizontal brown blinds. The text "ORCA" appears in white letters on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man looks down at his notes and continues speaking. In the final frame, the camera angle widens slightly to reveal the top of the podium, which features a small logo and text that reads "WASHINGTON STATE LIBRARY." The heads of other people are partially visible in the foreground, indicating he is addressing an audience.
